'''鈭歫-n-sh-j''' ('''kajanshejoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:outbake|outbake]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-n-sh-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:outbake|outbake]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歫-n-sh-j
|-
! Lemma
| kajanshejoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thijanshejoko|thijanshejoko]] || [[word:jijanshejoko|jijanshejoko]] || [[word:shijanshejoko|shijanshejoko]] || [[word:kijanshejoko|kijanshejoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthujanshejoko|thuthujanshejoko]] || [[word:jujujanshejoko|jujujanshejoko]] || [[word:shushujanshejoko|shushujanshejoko]] || [[word:kukujanshejoko|kukujanshejoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thujanshejoko|thujanshejoko]] || [[word:jujanshejoko|jujanshejoko]] || [[word:shujanshejoko|shujanshejoko]] || [[word:kujanshejoko|kujanshejoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thujanshejoko|thujanshejoko]] || [[word:jujanshejoko|jujanshejoko]] || [[word:shujanshejoko|shujanshejoko]] || [[word:kujanshejoko|kujanshejoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thojanshejoko|thojanshejoko]] || [[word:jojanshejoko|jojanshejoko]] || [[word:shojanshejoko|shojanshejoko]] || [[word:kojanshejoko|kojanshejoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thojanshejoko|thojanshejoko]] || [[word:jojanshejoko|jojanshejoko]] || [[word:shojanshejoko|shojanshejoko]] || [[word:kojanshejoko|kojanshejoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙janshejoko|th忙janshejoko]] || [[word:j忙janshejoko|j忙janshejoko]] || [[word:sh忙janshejoko|sh忙janshejoko]] || [[word:k忙janshejoko|k忙janshejoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathajanshejoko|thathajanshejoko]] || [[word:jajajanshejoko|jajajanshejoko]] || [[word:shashajanshejoko|shashajanshejoko]] || [[word:kakajanshejoko|kakajanshejoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thajanshejoko|thajanshejoko]] || [[word:jajanshejoko|jajanshejoko]] || [[word:shajanshejoko|shajanshejoko]] || [[word:kajanshejoko|kajanshejoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thajanshejoko|thajanshejoko]] || [[word:jajanshejoko|jajanshejoko]] || [[word:shajanshejoko|shajanshejoko]] || [[word:kajanshejoko|kajanshejoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
